specific_question: What percentage of in-store employees across all branches have reported a "Significantly better" understanding of the knowledge system after the June 2025 on-the-job training round, according to the post-training surveys?
answer: As noted in the post-training survey results, 39% of the in-store staff across all Lee's Market branches have reported "Significantly better" understanding of the knowledge system after participating in the June 2025 round of training.
dr_question: Considering the Retail Knowledge Management article published on the Knowmax website in June 2025, what AI integration strategies could Lee's Market consider for its knowledge systems to help achieve its financial targets for 2030?
